name: Secular Buddhism

quotes.text: The mind is like water. When it's turbulent, it's difficult to see. When it's calm, everything becomes clear.
quotes.author: Prasad

quotes.text: You only lose what you cling to.
quotes.author: Gautama Buddha

modernReframes: The digital ecosystem is designed to hijack your attention by turning notifications into synthetic crises. Recognize that the urge to check your phone is a temporary neurochemical wave. Observe the urge without executing it.
Your fractured focus is the result of clinging to every piece of incoming data. Practice letting notifications wash over you without immediately reacting. The urgency is an illusion.
